settings.title: Our Summer Courtyard Is Open Again
settings.excerpt: Twenty extra seats under the fig tree, plus a short warm-weather menu to match.
settings.body:
The weather has turned, which means the gate to the Saffron courtyard is unlocked once more.

There are twenty seats out back under the old fig tree, strung with lights for the evenings. It is first come, first served, so it fills quickly on warm nights.

We have added a few lighter dishes for the season, including a chilled yogurt soup and grilled stone fruit with honey. The courtyard stays open through the first cool nights of autumn.
